data.title: The three whales have accumulated a total of 14.36 million ASTER tokens, with a total value of approximately US$10.87 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, three whales are accumulating ASTER. A whale (0x04E...dd8) withdrew 7.04 million ASTER from Aster 13 hours ago, worth $4.66 million. A whale (0xe1D...c44) withdrew 5.1 million ASTER from Aster 10 hours ago, worth $4.1 million. A whale (0x841...2794) deposited 2.22 million APX (worth $2.22 million) into Aster two hours ago and subsequently withdrew 2.22 million ASTER, worth $2.11 million.

data.title: Justin Sun: SunPerp will launch deposit mining and transaction mining mechanisms to comprehensively enhance participation and profitability
data.description: Justin Sun, Huobi HTX Global Advisor and TRON Founder, unveiled SunPerp's technical architecture and development path for the first time at a themed Space event. He explained that SunPerp currently uses zero-knowledge proof (ZK) technology to transmit order information to the TRON mainnet. During the initial phase of operation, user position information will not be publicly displayed, but will be gradually opened up to users for independent selection. Sun emphasized that SunPerp is committed to creating an extremely smooth trading experience and promoting perpetual swaps as a more important trading tool than spot trading. Regarding incentive mechanisms, SunPerp will also introduce a "deposit-to-mining" model, supporting instant deposits and withdrawals, as well as "trading-to-mining." Opening positions on SunPerp will earn SUN tokens, enhancing user engagement and profitability.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $223 million yesterday, with only BlackRock's IBIT ETF achieving net inflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $223 million yesterday (September 19th, US Eastern Time). The Blackrock IBIT ETF saw the largest single-day net inflow yesterday, with a net inflow of $246 million, bringing IBIT's total net inflow to $60.645 billion. The Grayscale GBTC ETF saw the largest single-day net outflow yesterday, with a net outflow of $23.4955 million, bringing GBTC's total net outflow to $24.079 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was $152.306 billion, with a net asset value ratio (market capitalization relative to the total Bitcoin market capitalization) of 6.63%, and cumulative net inflows to $57.717 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $47.7524 million yesterday, with only BlackRock ETF ETHA achieving net inflows
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $47.7524 million yesterday (September 19th, US Eastern Time). The Blackrock ETF (ETHA) saw the largest daily net inflow yesterday, with a net inflow of $144 million. ETHA's total net inflow has now reached $13.399 billion. The Fidelity ETF (FETH) saw the largest daily net outflow yesterday, with a net outflow of $53.3993 million. FETH's total net inflow has now reached $2.874 billion. As of press time, the Ethereum spot ETF's total net asset value (NAV) was $29.636 billion, with a 5.51% ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization). The cumulative net inflow has reached $13.920 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidation Events
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass indicates that if Bitcoin surpasses $117,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of short positions on major centralized exchanges (CEX) will reach $594 million.

Conversely, if Bitcoin falls below $114,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of long positions on major CEXs will amount to $1.002 billion.

BlockBeats notes that the liquidation chart does not display the precise number of contracts pending liquidation or the exact value of contracts being liquidated. Instead, the chart's bars represent the relative importance of each liquidation cluster compared to nearby clusters, indicating intensity.

Therefore, the chart illustrates the extent to which the target price reaching a certain level will be affected. A higher "liquidation bar" suggests that once the price reaches that level, there will be a stronger reaction due to liquidity waves.

data.title: Economist: The Fed's rapid rate cut will significantly stimulate the rise of Bitcoin and altcoins in the coming months
data.description: Economist Timothy Peterson said the market is underestimating the likelihood of a rapid rate cut from the Federal Reserve in the coming months. "The Fed never envisioned such a gradual rate cut," he said, explaining that he expects "surprise effects" to play out and potentially catch the market off guard. "This will significantly stimulate the rise of Bitcoin and altcoins, and I think this will happen within the next three to nine months." (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETFs See Significant Inflows and Outflows
data.description:
According to PANews, data from SoSoValue indicates that on September 19, 2025, Bitcoin spot ETFs experienced a total net inflow of $223 million. The Blackrock ETF IBIT recorded the highest single-day net inflow of $246 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $60.645 billion. Conversely, the Grayscale ETF GBTC saw the largest single-day net outflow of $23.4955 million, with its historical total net outflow reaching $24.079 billion.

As of the latest report, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs stands at $152.306 billion. The ETF net asset ratio, which compares the market value to Bitcoin's total market capitalization, is at 6.63%. The cumulative historical net inflow for Bitcoin spot ETFs has reached $57.717 billion.

data.title: Yuga Labs co-founder: Yuga will give up APESTR royalties to buy back BAYC
data.description: Yuga Labs co-founder Garga.eth posted on social media, "APESTRA, the Ethereum ecosystem meme coin launched by TokenWorks, launched today. I am excited about this launch, but it is important to read and understand the associated fees. Expect significant volatility. Yuga will waive our royalties on APESTR in order to use our portion of the fees to repurchase BAYC (Bored Ape Yacht Club)."

data.title: Justin Sun announced three major benefits of SunPerp: the lowest fees in the industry, real cash back on deposits, and full coverage of future airdrop points.
data.description: Justin Sun, Global Advisor to Huobi HTX and Founder of TRON, comprehensively elaborated on SunPerp's development advantages and strategic vision in the "Boundless Imagination in the DEX 2.0 Era | Special Theme Space." Sun emphasized that SunPerp will offer users three key benefits: first, it will offer the lowest contract fees in the industry; second, it will soon launch a "Deposit and Get Real Money" promotion, which will substantially refund users' transaction gas fees; and third, it will gradually implement industry-standard new user acquisition methods such as commission rebates and points. From an ecosystem strategy perspective, Sun highlighted Perp DEX as a key platform that TRON must develop. "In the future, we will partner with multiple wallet projects to ensure that all USDT transactions are conducted through SunPerp." He further analyzed industry trends and believed that Perp DEX, with its higher leverage, smoother trading experience, and deeper liquidity, will become a mainstream trading option in the future, and SunPerp is expected to become the preferred trading tool for users. SunPerp is currently in its early public beta phase, and the team is actively developing infrastructure and improving liquidity.
